artifact.content_preview:
De : pierre.gagnon@ssc-spc.gc.ca
À : alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc : marie.lefebvre@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Objet : Demande d'ajout — Modernisation des postes de travail des utilisateurs
Date : 8 mars 2026

Bonjour Alice,

Je vous écris pour soumettre une demande d'ajout de portée au projet
NGIS Phase 3 de la part du gestionnaire de prestation de services.

Dans le cadre de la consolidation des sites B et C, plusieurs employés
des centres de données affectés devront être relocalisés au site A à
Gatineau. Le

extracted_tasks.text: Remplacer 85 ordinateurs portables et 40 postes de travail fixes pour les employés relocalisés au site A.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables... Remplacement de 40 postes de travail fixes... avant le 15 avril 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Examiner la demande d'ajout de portée au projet NGIS Phase 3.
Soumettre la demande d'ajout de portée au comité directeur.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: la soumettre au comité directeur lors de la prochaine réunion du 10 mars

extracted_tasks.text: Décision de relocaliser les employés des centres de données des sites B et C vers le site A à Gatineau.
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: plusieurs employés des centres de données affectés devront être relocalisés au site A à Gatineau

alerts.detected_ask: Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables et 40 postes de travail fixes pour un coût estimé de 210 000 $ à 240 000 $.
alerts.baseline_reference: OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
alerts.suggested_action: Reject the request as it is explicitly listed as 'Out of Scope'. Advise the stakeholder to initiate a separate procurement process or project, as this request would consume ~10% of the total budget and risks the April 30 Go-Live constraint.

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office",
    "Steering committee presentations (monthly)",
    "Risk register maintenance",
    "Change management and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (code or architecture changes)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and change management beyond project communications",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "D-001: Project Management Plan",
    "D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "D-008: Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date of June 30, 2026",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)",
    "Compliance with Official Languages Act for all client-facing deliverables",
    "Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope, schedule, or budget changes",
    "Classification level: Protected B"
  ]
}
```

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.0,
  "drift_type": "contradicts_scope",
  "detected_ask": "Remplacement de 85 ordinateurs portables et 40 postes de travail fixes pour un coût estimé de 210 000 $ à 240 000 $.",
  "baseline_reference": "OUT OF SCOPE: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
  "suggested_action": "Reject the request as it is explicitly listed as 'Out of Scope'. Advise the stakeholder to initiate a separate procurement process or project, as this request would consume ~10% of the total budget and risks the April 30 Go-Live constraint.",
  "reasoning": "The request directly contradicts the 'Out of Scope' section of the baseline which forbids end-user device refreshes. Furthermore, the proposed cost ($240k) and tight timeline (April 15) pose a significant risk to the project's fixed budget ($2.4M) and Go-Live deadline (April 30)."
}
```

Furthermore, the proposed cost ($240k) and tight timeline (April 15) pose a significant risk to the project's fixed budget ($2.4M) and Go-Live deadline (April 30).
